lesson_name: Showcase Prompts: Marketing-Ready Behavior Tree Patterns
description: Marketing showcase prompts for BT domain. Every prompt will appear in docs, landing page, or demo video. All must produce valid, impressive output.

prompts.instruction: Create an AI that stands still and waits 5 seconds in a loop
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_Idle
BLACKBOARD: BB_Idle

TREE:

SEQUENCE: Root
  DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
  TASK: Wait [Duration=5.0]

prompts.instruction: Make an enemy that walks to a single patrol point and waits there forever
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_WalkAndWait
BLACKBOARD: BB_WalkAndWait

KEY PatrolPoint: Vector

TREE:

SEQUENCE: Root
  TASK: MoveTo [Key=PatrolPoint, AcceptableRadius=50]
  TASK: Wait [Duration=999.0]

prompts.instruction: Build an AI that just chases the player whenever it can see them
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_Chase
BLACKBOARD: BB_Chase

KEY TargetActor: Object

TREE:

SEQUENCE: Root
  SERVICE: FindNearestActor [Class=Character, ResultKey=TargetActor, SearchRadius=2000, Interval=0.5]
  DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet]
  DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
  TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=200]

prompts.instruction: Make an NPC that walks between point A and point B repeatedly
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_ABPatrol
BLACKBOARD: BB_ABPatrol

KEY PointA: Vector
KEY PointB: Vector

TREE:

SEQUENCE: Root
  DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
  TASK: MoveTo [Key=PointA, AcceptableRadius=50]
  TASK: Wait [Duration=2.0]
  TASK: MoveTo [Key=PointB, AcceptableRadius=50]
  TASK: Wait [Duration=2.0]

prompts.instruction: Build a patrol guard. It walks between three waypoints with 2 second pauses. If it detects a player within 800 units, it abandons patrol and chases. When the player gets away, it returns to patrolling
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_PatrolGuard
BLACKBOARD: BB_PatrolGuard

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY WaypointA: Vector
KEY WaypointB: Vector
KEY WaypointC: Vector

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: FindNearestActor [Class=Character, ResultKey=TargetActor, SearchRadius=800, Interval=0.5]
  SEQUENCE: Chase
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=200]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Stop right there!"]
  SEQUENCE: Patrol
    DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=WaypointA, AcceptableRadius=50]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=2.0]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=WaypointB, AcceptableRadius=50]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=2.0]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=WaypointC, AcceptableRadius=50]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=2.0]

prompts.instruction: Create an enemy that patrols a route. If it hears a noise (SoundLocation key is set), it investigates that location. If it finds nothing after 5 seconds, clears the key and resumes patrol
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_Investigator
BLACKBOARD: BB_Investigator

KEY SoundLocation: Vector
KEY PatrolPoint: Vector

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SEQUENCE: Investigate
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=SoundLocation, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=SoundLocation, AcceptableRadius=100]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=5.0]
    TASK: ClearBlackboardValue [Key=SoundLocation]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Nothing here"]
  SEQUENCE: Patrol
    DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=PatrolPoint, AcceptableRadius=50]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=3.0]

prompts.instruction: Make a boss with three phases. Above 70% health: basic melee attacks. Between 30-70%: ranged attacks with a 3 second cooldown. Below 30%: rage mode with fast attacks
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_PhasedBoss
BLACKBOARD: BB_PhasedBoss

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY BossHealth: Float = 100.0

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SEQUENCE: RagePhase
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=BossHealth, Condition=LessThan, Value=30]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=150]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=40]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=0.3]
  SEQUENCE: RangedPhase
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=BossHealth, Condition=LessThan, Value=70]
    DECORATOR: Cooldown [Duration=3.0]
    TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=25]
  SEQUENCE: MeleePhase
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=200]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=15]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=1.0]

prompts.instruction: Create a healer AI that scans for nearby allies with low health. If an ally needs healing, move to them and heal. Otherwise follow the player at a safe distance
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_Healer
BLACKBOARD: BB_Healer

KEY InjuredAlly: Object
KEY FollowTarget: Object

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: FindNearestActor [Class=Pawn, ResultKey=InjuredAlly, SearchRadius=1500, Interval=1.0]
  SEQUENCE: HealAlly
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=InjuredAlly, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=InjuredAlly, AcceptableRadius=200]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Healing!"]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=2.0]
    TASK: ClearBlackboardValue [Key=InjuredAlly]
  SEQUENCE: FollowPlayer
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=FollowTarget, Condition=IsSet]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=FollowTarget, AcceptableRadius=400]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=1.0]

prompts.instruction: Build a sniper AI. It finds cover, moves there, then shoots at the player with a 2 second delay. If the player gets within 300 units, flee to a new position
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_Sniper
BLACKBOARD: BB_Sniper

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY CoverPoint: Vector
KEY DistToTarget: Float = 9999.0

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: UpdateDistance [TargetKey=TargetActor, ResultKey=DistToTarget, Interval=0.3]
  SEQUENCE: Flee
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=DistToTarget, Condition=LessThan, Value=300, AbortMode=Both]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=CoverPoint, AcceptableRadius=100]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Repositioning!"]
  SEQUENCE: Snipe
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=CoverPoint, AcceptableRadius=50]
    DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
    TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Firing!"]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=2.0]

prompts.instruction: Create a companion AI that follows the player at 400 units distance. If the player enters combat, the companion attacks the same target. After combat, return to following
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_Companion
BLACKBOARD: BB_Companion

KEY FollowTarget: Object
KEY EnemyTarget: Object
KEY IsPlayerInCombat: Bool = false

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SEQUENCE: HelpInCombat
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=IsPlayerInCombat, Condition=Equals, Value=true, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=EnemyTarget, Condition=IsSet]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=EnemyTarget, AcceptableRadius=200]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=EnemyTarget, Damage=15]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=1.0]
  SEQUENCE: Follow
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=FollowTarget, Condition=IsSet]
    DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=FollowTarget, AcceptableRadius=400]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=1.0]

prompts.instruction: Build a stealth enemy that patrols silently. When it spots the player, it goes on alert, calls for backup, and chases. If it loses the player for 10 seconds, returns to patrol
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_StealthEnemy
BLACKBOARD: BB_StealthEnemy

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY PatrolPoint: Vector
KEY IsAlert: Bool = false

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: FindNearestActor [Class=Character, ResultKey=TargetActor, SearchRadius=1200, Interval=0.5]
  SEQUENCE: ChaseAndAlert
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: SetBlackboardValue [Key=IsAlert, Value=true]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Intruder spotted!"]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=200]
  SEQUENCE: SearchTimeout
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=IsAlert, Condition=Equals, Value=true]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=10.0]
    TASK: SetBlackboardValue [Key=IsAlert, Value=false]
    TASK: ClearBlackboardValue [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Lost them"]
  SEQUENCE: Patrol
    DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=PatrolPoint, AcceptableRadius=50]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=3.0]

prompts.instruction: Make a zombie AI. It wanders randomly when no target is near. When it detects a player, it shambles toward them slowly. When within attack range, it attacks and pauses for 3 seconds
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_Zombie
BLACKBOARD: BB_Zombie

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY DistToTarget: Float = 9999.0
KEY WanderPoint: Vector

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: FindNearestActor [Class=Character, ResultKey=TargetActor, SearchRadius=1000, Interval=0.5]
  SERVICE: UpdateDistance [TargetKey=TargetActor, ResultKey=DistToTarget, Interval=0.3]
  SEQUENCE: Attack
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=Both]
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=DistToTarget, Condition=LessThan, Value=200]
    TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=20]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=3.0]
  SEQUENCE: Shamble
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=150]
  SEQUENCE: Wander
    DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=WanderPoint, AcceptableRadius=100]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=4.0]
